trans-unit.resname: You might create a sequence of challenges where players won't be able to access a new game or challenge until they obtain a key from previous activity. For this purpose, you might set up an access code as well as a message that will be displayed to players when they reach a fixed percentage of correct answers, which they can use as a password for a new challenge or a following activity.
trans-unit.source: You might create a sequence of challenges where players won't be able to access a new game or challenge until they obtain a key from previous activity. For this purpose, you might set up an access code as well as a message that will be displayed to players when they reach a fixed percentage of correct answers, which they can use as a password for a new challenge or a following activity.
trans-unit.target: Podeu crear un itinerari de desafiaments on els jugadors no podran accedir a un nou joc o desafiament fins que obtinguen una clau en una activitat prèvia. Per a aquest propòsit, pot establir un codi d'accés, així com un missatge que es pot mostrar als jugadors quan obtenen un percentatge fix de colps, i es pot utilitzar com a contrasenya per a un nou desafiament o una activitat següent.

trans-unit.source: The format requires a question (non-empty string), a solution (0 or 1), a suggestion (mandatory, can be empty), and feedback (mandatory, can be empty).
trans-unit.target: El format requereix una pregunta (cadena no buida), una solució (0 o 1), una suggerència (obligatòria, pot estar buida), i comentaris (obligatoris, pot estar buits).

trans-unit.source: Does water boil at 100 degrees Celsius?

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 words followed by their definitions, separated by #. Do not include the # character in either the word or the definition.
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 words followed by their definitions, separated by #. Do not include the # character in either the word or the definition.
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 paraules seguides de les seues definicions, separades per #. No inclogues el caràcter # ni en la paraula ni en la definició.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 30 words and their definitions separated by #.
trans-unit.source: Generate 30 words and their definitions separated by #.
trans-unit.target: Genera 30 paraules i les seues definicions separades per #.

trans-unit.resname: Create 10 multiple-choice questions with 2 to 4 options. Start with the correct solution (0, 1, 2, or 3), followed by the question and each option, all separated by #.
trans-unit.source: Create 10 multiple-choice questions with 2 to 4 options. Start with the correct solution (0, 1, 2, or 3), followed by the question and each option, all separated by #.
trans-unit.target: Crea 10 preguntes de tria múltiple amb 2 a 4 opcions. Comença amb la solució correcta (0, 1, 2, o 3), seguida de la pregunta i cada opció, totes separades per #.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 multiple-choice questions. Provide the correct answer as letters (e.g., A, AB), followed by the question and the options, all separated by #.
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 multiple-choice questions. Provide the correct answer as letters (e.g., A, AB), followed by the question and the options, all separated by #.
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 preguntes amb opcions de tria múltiple. Proporciona la solució correcta com a lletres (per exemple, A, AB), seguida de la pregunta i les opcions, totes separades per #.

trans-unit.resname: Create 5 solution words followed by 3 to 9 clues that describe each one. Separate each clue with #.
trans-unit.source: Create 5 solution words followed by 3 to 9 clues that describe each one. Separate each clue with #.
trans-unit.target: Proporciona 5 paraules de solució seguides de 3 a 9 pistes que les descriuen. Separa cada pista amb #.

trans-unit.resname: Provide 4 elements for each of these groups: carnivores, 0, and herbivores, 1. Separate the group number and the element using the symbol #.
trans-unit.source: Provide 4 elements for each of these groups: carnivores, 0, and herbivores, 1. Separate the group number and the element using the symbol #.
trans-unit.target: Proporciona 4 elements per a cada grup: carnívors, 0, i herbívors, 1. Separa el grup i l'element amb #.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 true or false questions. Each question must include the solution (0 = false, 1 = true), a suggestion, and feedback, all separated by #. Additionally, the feedback must not explicitly indicate whether the response is correct or incorrect
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 true or false questions. Each question must include the solution (0 = false, 1 = true), a suggestion, and feedback, all separated by #. Additionally, the feedback must not explicitly indicate whether the response is correct or incorrect
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 preguntes de vertader o fals. Cada pregunta ha d'incloure la solució (0 = fals, 1 = vertader), una suggerència i retroalimentació, tot separat per #. A més, la retroalimentació no ha d'indicar explícitament si la resposta és correcta o incorrecta

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 questions. The 'Solution' can be 0/1 for True/False, 0-3 for single-choice, or A-D (or combinations) for multiple-choice. Then provide the question and the answer options (2 to 4), all separated by '#'.
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 questions. The 'Solution' can be 0/1 for True/False, 0-3 for single-choice, or A-D (or combinations) for multiple-choice. Then provide the question and the answer options (2 to 4), all separated by '#'.
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 preguntes. La 'Solució' pot ser 0/1 per a Veritat/Fals, 0-3 per a tria única, o A-D (o combinacions) per a tria múltiple. Després, proporciona la pregunta i les opcions de resposta (2 a 4), totes separades per '#'.

trans-unit.resname: Provide only one ordered list of steps or items, each separated by '#'.
trans-unit.source: Provide only one ordered list of steps or items, each separated by '#'.
trans-unit.target: Proporciona només una llista ordenada de passos o elements, cadascun separat per '#'.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 words followed by their definitions, separated by #. Do not include the # character in either the word or the definition
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 words followed by their definitions, separated by #. Do not include the # character in either the word or the definition
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 paraules seguides de les seues definicions, separades per #. No inclogas el caràcter # ni a la paraula ni a la definició

trans-unit.resname: You can save the score as many times as you want
trans-unit.source: You can save the score as many times as you want

trans-unit.source: You can do this activity as many times as you want

trans-unit.resname: Please provide at least one word
trans-unit.source: Please provide at least one word

trans-unit.resname: Provide a word and its definition. May toggle between: "Word starts" or "Word contains", by clicking on %s
trans-unit.source: Provide a word and its definition. May toggle between: "Word starts" or "Word contains", by clicking on %s
trans-unit.target: Proporciona una paraula i la seua definició. Pots alternar entre: "La paraula comença amb" o "La paraula conté", fent clic en %s

trans-unit.resname: Create activities in which students are given a definition and they have to guess the word that starts with a letter or contains a letter.
trans-unit.source: Create activities in which students are given a definition and they have to guess the word that starts with a letter or contains a letter.
trans-unit.target: Creeu activitats o en les quals donada la definició d'una paraula, se sol·licite a l'alumnat la mateixa paraula que comença o conté la lletra que s'assenyala.

trans-unit.resname: Observe the letters, identify and fill in the missing words.
trans-unit.source: Observe the letters, identify and fill in the missing words.
trans-unit.target: Observa les lletres, identifica i emplena les paraules que falten.

trans-unit.resname: You must indicate the ID. It can be a word, a phrase or a number of more than four characters. You will use this ID to mark the activities covered by this progress report. It must be the same in all iDevices of a report and different in each report.
trans-unit.source: You must indicate the ID. It can be a word, a phrase or a number of more than four characters. You will use this ID to mark the activities covered by this progress report. It must be the same in all iDevices of a report and different in each report.
trans-unit.target: Heu d'indicar l'identificador, pot ser una paraula, una frase o un número de més de quatre caràcters, que utilitzareu per a marcar les activitats que seran tingudes en compte en este informe de progrés. Ha de ser el mateix en tots els iDevices d'un informe i diferent en els de cada informe.

trans-unit.resname: Click here to toggle between Word starts with... and Word contains...
trans-unit.source: Click here to toggle between Word starts with... and Word contains...
trans-unit.target: Feu clic ací per a canviar entre La paraula comença per... i La paraula conté...

trans-unit.resname: Indicate a valid URL of an image or select one from your device
trans-unit.source: Indicate a valid URL of an image or select one from your device
trans-unit.target: Indiqueu l'URL vàlida d'una imatge o seleccioneu una del teu dispositiu

trans-unit.resname: Indicate a valid URL of an audio or select one from your device
trans-unit.source: Indicate a valid URL of an audio or select one from your device
trans-unit.target: Indiqueu l'URL d'un fitxer d'àudio o seleccioneu un del seu dispositiu

trans-unit.resname: Create before-and-after comparisons with side-by-side images of similar or proportional size.
trans-unit.source: Create before-and-after comparisons with side-by-side images of similar or proportional size.
trans-unit.target: Crea comparacions de abans i després amb imatges costat a costat de mida similar o proporcional.

trans-unit.resname: Cool! The information you were looking for
trans-unit.source: Cool! The information you were looking for
trans-unit.target: Molt bé! La informació que estaves buscant

trans-unit.source: The selected file does not contain a valid game
trans-unit.target: El fitxer seleccionat no té una partida vàlida

trans-unit.source: Your browser is not compatible with this tool.
trans-unit.target: El vostre navegador no és compatible amb aquesta eina.

trans-unit.resname: Please create at least one card
trans-unit.source: Please create at least one card

trans-unit.resname: At least one image has no description, are you sure you want to continue without including it? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.source: At least one image has no description, are you sure you want to continue without including it? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.target: Almenys una imatge no té descripció, esteu segur que voleu continuar sense incloure-la? Sense ella, la imatge pot no ser accessible per a alguns usuaris amb discapacitats, o per a aquells que utilitzen un navegador de text, o que naveguen per la Web amb les imatges desactivades.

trans-unit.resname: The report identifier must have at least 5 characters
trans-unit.source: The report identifier must have at least 5 characters
trans-unit.target: L'identificador de l'informe ha de tindre almenys 5 caràcters

trans-unit.resname: Slide to reveal the differences between the images.
trans-unit.source: Slide to reveal the differences between the images.
trans-unit.target: Desliza per revelar les diferències entre les imatges.

trans-unit.resname: Both images should have a similar or proportional size.
trans-unit.source: Both images should have a similar or proportional size.
trans-unit.target: Les dos imatges haurien de tindre un tamany similar o proporcional.

trans-unit.resname: Do you want to delete this activity?
trans-unit.source: Do you want to delete this activity?

trans-unit.resname: The case study must have at least one activity
trans-unit.source: The case study must have at least one activity
trans-unit.target: L'estudi de cas ha de tenir com a mínim una activitat

trans-unit.resname: You must provide the text for each activity
trans-unit.source: You must provide the text for each activity
trans-unit.target: Heu de proporcionar el text per a cada activitat

trans-unit.resname: Read the instructions and click on a trial when you're ready to play.
trans-unit.source: Read the instructions and click on a trial when you're ready to play.
trans-unit.target: Llegiu el repte i, quan estigueu llest, premeu sobre una prova per a jugar.

trans-unit.resname: You've completed all the trials! You can now complete the game.
trans-unit.source: You've completed all the trials! You can now complete the game.
trans-unit.target: Heu resolt totes les proves! Completeu el repte!

trans-unit.resname: You made it! You can restart to play again.
trans-unit.source: You made it! You can restart to play again.
trans-unit.target: Heu resolt el repte! Premeu reiniciar per a una nova partida.

trans-unit.resname: Time Over. Please restart to try again.
trans-unit.source: Time Over. Please restart to try again.
trans-unit.target: El temps ha finalitzat i no heu resolt el repte. Premeu sobre reiniciar per a intentar-ho de nou.

trans-unit.resname: You solved this trial! Please select another one.
trans-unit.source: You solved this trial! Please select another one.

trans-unit.resname: You can use a checklist as a structured and easy way to understand the suggested activities in this educational resource. It will be a useful instrument for student self-assessment, allowing to monitor the completed activities.
trans-unit.source: You can use a checklist as a structured and easy way to understand the suggested activities in this educational resource. It will be a useful instrument for student self-assessment, allowing to monitor the completed activities.
trans-unit.target: Podeu introduir una llista de control per a oferir un llistat estructurat i fàcil d'entendre de les activitats proposades al llarg del recurs educatiu. Serà un instrument útil per a l'autoregulació de l'aprenentatge de l'alumnat, en permetre-li realitzar el seguiment de les activitats que va completant.

trans-unit.resname: Complete the checklist ticking the boxes for all finished activities.

trans-unit.target: Fes clic al botó de commutació per canviar entre preguntes amb una resposta correcta i preguntes amb moltes respostes possibles correctes.

trans-unit.resname: Enter the text for the drop-down activity in the drop-down field either by pasting the text from another source or by typing it directly into the field. To select which words to choose, double-click on a word to select it and click on the button below.
trans-unit.source: Enter the text for the drop-down activity in the drop-down field either by pasting the text from another source or by typing it directly into the field. To select which words to choose, double-click on a word to select it and click on the button below.
trans-unit.target: Introdueix el text per a l'activitat en el camp corresponent, ja siga enganxant-lo o escrivint-lo directament. Per triar les paraules del desplegable, selecciona una paraula i fes clic en el botó de davall.

trans-unit.resname: Type or paste the text for the fill-in-the-blank activity into the field. Select the words and use the button below to hide them. You can define more than one possible answer using vertical bars to surround and separate them. E.g.: |dog|cat|bird|
trans-unit.source: Type or paste the text for the fill-in-the-blank activity into the field. Select the words and use the button below to hide them. You can define more than one possible answer using vertical bars to surround and separate them. E.g.: |dog|cat|bird|
trans-unit.target: Escriviu o enganxeu el text de l'activitat d'omplir espais en blanc al camp. Seleccioneu les paraules i utilitzeu el botó de sota per ocultar-les. Podeu definir més d'una resposta possible utilitzant barres verticals per envoltar-les i separar-les. P. ex.: |gos|gat|ocell|

trans-unit.resname: If unchecked, a small number of spelling and capitalization errors will be accepted. If checked, no spelling or capitalization errors will be accepted. Example: If the correct answer is Elephant and it says elephant or Eliphant, both will be considered as "close enough" by the algorithm, as there is only one spelling error, even if "Check capitalization" is checked. If the case check is disabled in this example, the lowercase letter e is not considered an error and eliphant will also be accepted. If "Strict qualification" and "Check capitalization" are enabled, the only correct answer is "Elephant". If only "Strict qualification" is enabled and "Check capitalization" is not, "elephant" will also be accepted.
trans-unit.source: If unchecked, a small number of spelling and capitalization errors will be accepted. If checked, no spelling or capitalization errors will be accepted. Example: If the correct answer is Elephant and it says elephant or Eliphant, both will be considered as "close enough" by the algorithm, as there is only one spelling error, even if "Check capitalization" is checked. If the case check is disabled in this example, the lowercase letter e is not considered an error and eliphant will also be accepted. If "Strict qualification" and "Check capitalization" are enabled, the only correct answer is "Elephant". If only "Strict qualification" is enabled and "Check capitalization" is not, "elephant" will also be accepted.
trans-unit.target: Si no està marcat, s'acceptarà un petit nombre d'errors d'ortografia i de majúscules. Si està marcat, no s'acceptaran errors d'ortografia ni de majúscules. Exemple: Si la resposta correcta és Elefant i diu elefant o Eliphant, ambdues seran considerades com "suficientment properes" per l'algoritme, ja que només hi ha un error d'ortografia, encara que "Comprova majúscules" estiga marcat. Si en aquest exemple es desactiva la verificació de majúscules, la lletra minúscula e no es considerarà un error i també s'acceptarà el terme eliphant. Si s'activen "Qualificació estricta" i "Comprova majúscules", l'única resposta correcta serà "Elefant". Si només s'activa "Qualificació estricta" i "Comprova majúscules" no, també s'acceptarà "elefant".

trans-unit.resname: If this option is checked, answers submitted with case differences will be marked as incorrect.
trans-unit.source: If this option is checked, answers submitted with case differences will be marked as incorrect.
trans-unit.target: Si aquesta opció està marcada, les respostes enviades amb diferències de majúscules i minúscules seran marcades com incorrectes.
Mostra l'ajuda de la barra d'eines
Mostra el botó de pantalla completa

trans-unit.resname: Insert a GeoGebra activity from www.geogebra.org. It requires an Internet connection.
trans-unit.source: Insert a GeoGebra activity from www.geogebra.org. It requires an Internet connection.
trans-unit.target: Insereix una activitat de GeoGebra des de www.geogebra.org. Requereix connexió a Internet.

Heu perdut totes les teues vides!

trans-unit.source: Please provide the definition of the word or phrase

trans-unit.source: You have to complete the question

trans-unit.source: Please type or paste a valid URL.

trans-unit.resname: Create activities where, given a definition, students complete the word by filling in the missing letters.
trans-unit.source: Create activities where, given a definition, students complete the word by filling in the missing letters.
trans-unit.target: Creeu activitats en les quals, donada la definició d'una paraula, la sol·liciten completant les lletres que falten.

trans-unit.resname: No lives, 0 to 10 score, right/wrong answers counter... A more educational context.
trans-unit.source: No lives, 0 to 10 score, right/wrong answers counter... A more educational context.
trans-unit.target: Sense vides, puntuació de 0 a 10, comptador de respostes correctes/incorrectes... Un context més educatiu.

trans-unit.resname: Just like a game: Aim for a high score (thousands of points) and try not to lose your lives.
trans-unit.source: Just like a game: Aim for a high score (thousands of points) and try not to lose your lives.
trans-unit.target: Com un joc: intenta aconseguir milers de punts i no perdre les teues vides.

trans-unit.resname: No score and no lives. You have to answer right to get some information (a feedback).
trans-unit.source: No score and no lives. You have to answer right to get some information (a feedback).
trans-unit.target: No hi ha puntuació ni vides. Heu de contestar bé per a aconseguir una certa informació (retroacció).

trans-unit.resname: and information that will be very useful
trans-unit.source: and information that will be very useful
trans-unit.target: i informació que serà molt útil

trans-unit.resname: No more attempts left. Please answer the question.
trans-unit.source: No more attempts left. Please answer the question.

trans-unit.resname: You must upload or indicate the valid URL of an image

trans-unit.target: Heu de completar totes les opcions seleccionades

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to continue without including an image description? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to continue without including an image description? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.target: Estàs segur de voler continuar sense incloure una descripció de la imatge? Sense ella, la imatge podria no ser accessible per a alguns usuaris amb discapacitats, o per a aquells que utilitzen un navegador de text o naveguen per la Web amb imatges desactivades.

trans-unit.resname: Create interactive challenges in which students progressively reveal sections of a concealed image and then choose the correct answer based on the visual clues.
trans-unit.source: Create interactive challenges in which students progressively reveal sections of a concealed image and then choose the correct answer based on the visual clues.

trans-unit.resname: Reveal the hidden image and choose the right answer.
trans-unit.source: Reveal the hidden image and choose the right answer.

trans-unit.source: You used one clue. You can only get %s points.

trans-unit.source: In preview mode, visit this progress report to see the status of all associated scored activities. This status can be:
trans-unit.target: En mode d'assaig, visita aquest informe de progrés per veure l'estat de totes les activitats puntuades associades. Aquest estat pot ser:

trans-unit.resname: This message will only be displayed in edit mode.
trans-unit.source: This message will only be displayed in edit mode.
trans-unit.target: Aquest missatge només es mostrarà en mode d'edició.

trans-unit.resname: In local mode, the results of completed activities cannot be displayed in the report
trans-unit.source: In local mode, the results of completed activities cannot be displayed in the report
trans-unit.target: En mode local, no es poden mostrar els resultats de les activitats completes en l'informe

trans-unit.resname: Edit this iDevice to update its contents.
trans-unit.source: Edit this iDevice to update its contents.
trans-unit.target: Edita aquest iDevice per actualitzar-ne el contingut.

trans-unit.resname: It shows the result of the pupils in the activities linked to their average score.
trans-unit.source: It shows the result of the pupils in the activities linked to their average score.
trans-unit.target: Mostra els resultats obtinguts per l'alumnat en les activitats associades al mateix i la seua nota mitjana.

trans-unit.resname: The ID can be a number or word of more than five characters. You must use the same ID in all the activities you will assess in this progress report.
trans-unit.source: The ID can be a number or word of more than five characters. You must use the same ID in all the activities you will assess in this progress report.
trans-unit.target: L'ID pot ser un número o una paraula de més de cinc caràcters. Has d'utilitzar el mateix ID en totes les activitats que avaluaràs en aquest informe de progrés.
Totes les pàgines i els iDevices

trans-unit.resname: All pages and only evaluable iDevices
trans-unit.source: All pages and only evaluable iDevices
trans-unit.target: Totes les pàgines i només els iDevices avaluables

trans-unit.resname: This iDevice is compatible with all game iDevices and all interactive activities.
trans-unit.source: This iDevice is compatible with all game iDevices and all interactive activities.
trans-unit.target: Aquest dispositiu és compatible amb tots els dispositius de joc i totes les activitats interactives.

trans-unit.resname: Number of activities to be completed
trans-unit.source: Number of activities to be completed

trans-unit.resname: You must select the puzzle image
trans-unit.source: You must select the puzzle image
trans-unit.target: Has de seleccionar la imatge del trencaclosques

trans-unit.resname: Create interactive activities where players must solve various puzzles.
trans-unit.source: Create interactive activities where players must solve various puzzles.
trans-unit.target: Crea activitats interactives on els jugadors hagin de resoldre diversos trencaclosques.

trans-unit.resname: Create activities in which students see a video, image or text and they have to choose the right answer.
trans-unit.source: Create activities in which students see a video, image or text and they have to choose the right answer.
trans-unit.target: Creeu activitats en les quals donat un vídeo, imatge o text, se sol·licite a l'alumnat la resposta correcta a la qüestió.

trans-unit.resname: Create activities with multiple choice questions or questions in which you have to put the answers in the right order.
trans-unit.source: Create activities with multiple choice questions or questions in which you have to put the answers in the right order.
trans-unit.target: Creeu activitats de resposta múltiple amb cap, una o diverses opcions correctes i/o activitats i jocs d'ordenació, en els quals el jugador haurà d'organitzar les diferents opcions segons l'ordre indicat en la qüestió.

trans-unit.resname: Choose the right answers and click on the Check button.
trans-unit.source: Choose the right answers and click on the Check button.
trans-unit.target: Tria les respostes correctes i fes clic al botó Comprovar.

trans-unit.resname: Different order each time you run the game.
trans-unit.source: Different order each time you run the game.

trans-unit.resname: The questions will change depending on the answers.
trans-unit.source: The questions will change depending on the answers.
trans-unit.target: L'ordre de les qüestions depén de les respostes del jugador.

trans-unit.resname: Play audio when displaying the solution
trans-unit.source: Play audio when displaying the solution
trans-unit.target: Reproduir àudio en mostrar la solució

trans-unit.resname: The video's end time must be shorter than its total duration
trans-unit.source: The video's end time must be shorter than its total duration
trans-unit.target: El valor del punt final del vídeo ha de ser inferior a la seua duració

trans-unit.resname: Games with local videos or audios can't be exported
trans-unit.source: Games with local videos or audios can't be exported
trans-unit.target: Els jocs amb vídeos o àudios locals no es poden exportar

trans-unit.resname: Please provide the word definition or the valid URL of an image
trans-unit.source: Please provide the word definition or the valid URL of an image
trans-unit.target: Proporcioneu la definició de la paraula o l'URL vàlida d'una imatge

trans-unit.resname: You have to indicate the start and the end of the video that you want to show
trans-unit.source: You have to indicate the start and the end of the video that you want to show
trans-unit.target: Heu d'indicar el començament i el final del vídeo que vulgueu mostrar

trans-unit.resname: The video end value must be higher than the start one
trans-unit.source: The video end value must be higher than the start one
trans-unit.target: El valor del final del vídeo ha de ser major que el del començament

trans-unit.resname: That second is not part of the video. Please check the video duration.
trans-unit.source: That second is not part of the video. Please check the video duration.
trans-unit.target: Eixe segon no forma part del vídeo. Si us plau, comprova la seua durada.

trans-unit.resname: There is already a question in that second.
trans-unit.source: There is already a question in that second.
trans-unit.target: Ja hi ha una qüestió referida a aqueix segon.

trans-unit.target: Escriu el missatge que es mostrarà en superar el joc

trans-unit.source: Use a YouTube URL or select a file (mp4, ogg, webm, mp3, wav)

trans-unit.source: Create activities consisting on a video with interactive questions.

trans-unit.source: Provide an image, text or audio for each card's front side
trans-unit.target: Has d'indicar una imatge, un text o/i un àudio per a la cara anterior de cada targeta

trans-unit.source: Provide an image, text or audio for each card's back side

trans-unit.source: Match each card with its pair.
trans-unit.target: Relacioneu cada targeta amb la seua parella.

trans-unit.resname: Complete the table to define a scoring guide. Define the score or value of each descriptor.
trans-unit.source: Complete the table to define a scoring guide. Define the score or value of each descriptor.
trans-unit.target: Completeu la taula per a definir una guia de qualificació. Definiu la puntuació o el valor de cada descriptor.

trans-unit.resname: Learn how to apply a rubric
trans-unit.source: Learn how to apply a rubric

trans-unit.target: Carregar les rúbriques del CEDEC (en espanyol)

trans-unit.resname: The result of adding the scores of the first level.
trans-unit.source: The result of adding the scores of the first level.
trans-unit.target: Resultat de sumar les qualificacions del primer nivell.

trans-unit.resname: Revert all changes? This can't be undone.
trans-unit.source: Revert all changes? This can't be undone.
trans-unit.target: Desfer els canvis? No té volta arrere.
Escriviu un títol per a la rúbrica.

trans-unit.resname: Please write the level name in each column.
trans-unit.source: Please write the level name in each column.
trans-unit.target: Escriviu el nom del nivell en cada columna.

trans-unit.resname: Please write the criteria name in each row.
trans-unit.source: Please write the criteria name in each row.
trans-unit.target: Escriviu el nom dels criteris en cada fila.

trans-unit.resname: Please write all the criteria descriptors.
trans-unit.source: Please write all the criteria descriptors.
trans-unit.target: Escriviu tots els descriptors dels criteris.

trans-unit.resname: There should be at least one level.
trans-unit.source: There should be at least one level.

trans-unit.resname: Please export the content to apply the rubric.
trans-unit.source: Please export the content to apply the rubric.
trans-unit.target: Per favor, exporta el contingut per aplicar la rúbrica.

trans-unit.resname: Please write the text to show when right.
trans-unit.source: Please write the text to show when right.

trans-unit.resname: Please write the text to show when wrong.

trans-unit.resname: There cannot be 2 or more identical elements.
trans-unit.source: There cannot be 2 or more identical elements.
trans-unit.target: No pot haver-hi 2 o més elements idèntics.

Retroacció que se superposa quan la resposta és incorrecta

trans-unit.resname: The right answer will be shown after this text.

trans-unit.source: Do you want to restart the game?

trans-unit.source: The game has finished. The winner is %1. Do you want to play again?
trans-unit.target: El joc ha acabat. El guanyador és %1. Desitgeu tornar a jugar?

trans-unit.resname: Your score will be automatically saved after each throw.
trans-unit.source: Your score will be automatically saved after each throw.
trans-unit.target: La seua puntuació es guardarà automàticament després de cada tirada.

trans-unit.resname: The silence time is wrong. Check the video duration.
trans-unit.source: The silence time is wrong. Check the video duration.
trans-unit.target: El temps de silenci indicat no és correcte. Comprova la duració del vídeo.

trans-unit.resname: Roll the dice and answer the question until you get all the cheeses.
trans-unit.source: Roll the dice and answer the question until you get all the cheeses.
trans-unit.target: Llança el dau i contesta a la qüestió fins a completar tots les porcions.

trans-unit.resname: Too many questions! The game can have a maximum of about 800 and 1200 questions. This number can vary a lot depending on the type of questions and the length of the questions, the answers, the URLs and the enriched text.
trans-unit.source: Too many questions! The game can have a maximum of about 800 and 1200 questions. This number can vary a lot depending on the type of questions and the length of the questions, the answers, the URLs and the enriched text.
trans-unit.target: Massa preguntes! El joc pot tindre un màxim d'unes 800 a 1200 preguntes. Aquest número pot variar molt depenent dels tipus de qüestions i la longitud de la seua qüestió, les seues respostes, URLs i textos enriquits.

trans-unit.resname: Create an educational board game with different question types (test, order, definition) of different categories. From 1 to 4 players or teams.
trans-unit.source: Create an educational board game with different question types (test, order, definition) of different categories. From 1 to 4 players or teams.
trans-unit.target: Creeu un joc de taula educatiu amb diferents tipus de qüestions (test, ordena, definició) organitzades per categories. D'1 a 4 jugadors o equips.

trans-unit.resname: This game may present accessibility problems for some users. You should provide an accessible alternative if the users need it.
trans-unit.source: This game may present accessibility problems for some users. You should provide an accessible alternative if the users need it.
trans-unit.target: Aquest joc pot presentar problemes d'accessibilitat per a algunes persones. Ha de tindre-ho en compte a l'hora d'elaborar el contingut i, si els seus destinataris el requereixen, proporcionar una alternativa accessible.

trans-unit.resname: You must provide a name for this topic.

Deixa els arxius aquí per pujar-los

trans-unit.source: Paste is now in plain text mode. Click again to toggle back to regular paste mode. After you paste something you will be returned to regular paste mode.

trans-unit.source: The URL you entered seems to be an external link. Do you want to add the required http:// prefix?

trans-unit.resname: This software is provided as a preview and should not be distributed. It is under development and is subject to substantial change. Consider the included information incomplete and use it with caution.
trans-unit.source: This software is provided as a preview and should not be distributed. It is under development and is subject to substantial change. Consider the included information incomplete and use it with caution.

trans-unit.resname: eXeLearning is a free software tool under the GNU Affero GPL that can be used to create educational interactive web contents. eXeLearning can generate interactive contents in different formats and it allows you to create easily navigable web pages. All the educational materials generated with eXeLearning can be exported in different digital formats, to be used independently or to integrate them into a LMS (Learning Management System) like Moodle.
trans-unit.source: eXeLearning is a free software tool under the GNU Affero GPL that can be used to create educational interactive web contents. eXeLearning can generate interactive contents in different formats and it allows you to create easily navigable web pages. All the educational materials generated with eXeLearning can be exported in different digital formats, to be used independently or to integrate them into a LMS (Learning Management System) like Moodle.
trans-unit.target: eXeLearning és una eina de programari lliure sota GNU Affero GPL que es pot utilitzar per a crear continguts web educatius interactius. eXeLearning pot generar continguts interactius en diferents formats i permet crear pàgines web fàcilment navegables. Tot el material educatiu generat amb eXeLearning es pot exportar en diferents formats digitals, per a ser utilitzat de manera independent o per a integrar-los en un LMS (Learning Management System) com Moodle.

trans-unit.resname: You must select an image and text for this card
trans-unit.source: You must select an image and text for this card
trans-unit.target: Heu de seleccionar una imatge i un text per a aquesta targeta

trans-unit.resname: You must indicate a text or sound for this card
trans-unit.source: You must indicate a text or sound for this card
trans-unit.target: Heu d'indicar un text o un so per a aquesta targeta

trans-unit.resname: You must link an image or sound to this card
trans-unit.source: You must link an image or sound to this card
trans-unit.target: Heu d'enllaçar una imatge o un so a aquesta targeta

trans-unit.resname: Type the right URL of a Youtube video
trans-unit.source: Type the right URL of a Youtube video
trans-unit.target: Introduïu l'URL correcte d'un vídeo de YouTube

trans-unit.resname: The number of attempts has to be bigger or equal to the number of pairs in the game. Please select 0 for infinite an unlimited number of attempts
trans-unit.source: The number of attempts has to be bigger or equal to the number of pairs in the game. Please select 0 for infinite an unlimited number of attempts
trans-unit.target: El nombre d'intents ha de ser major o igual que el nombre de parelles del joc. Seleccioneu 0 per a un nombre il·limitat d'intents

trans-unit.resname: Choose a file or paste a link (URL)
trans-unit.source: Choose a file or paste a link (URL)
trans-unit.target: Trieu un fitxer o enganxeu un enllaç (URL)

trans-unit.resname: Please select the media file to edit it
trans-unit.source: Please select the media file to edit it
trans-unit.target: Seleccioneu el fitxer multimèdia per a editar-lo

trans-unit.resname: Class added to the "CSS class" field.
trans-unit.source: Class added to the "CSS class" field.

trans-unit.resname: That content was created using the old formula editor.
trans-unit.source: That content was created using the old formula editor.
trans-unit.target: Aquest contingut va ser creat amb l'antic editor de fórmules.

trans-unit.resname: Make it compatible with the new editor?
trans-unit.source: Make it compatible with the new editor?
trans-unit.target: Voleu fer-lo compatible amb el nou editor?

trans-unit.resname: Done! Please select the LaTeX code that you want to edit.
trans-unit.source: Done! Please select the LaTeX code that you want to edit.
trans-unit.target: Fet! Seleccioneu el codi LaTeX que voleu editar.

trans-unit.resname: Sorry, but the formula is not compatible with this editor.
trans-unit.source: Sorry, but the formula is not compatible with this editor.
trans-unit.target: Ho sentim, però la fórmula no és compatible amb aquest editor.

trans-unit.resname: If you want to edit a previous code, please select it before opening the editor.
trans-unit.source: If you want to edit a previous code, please select it before opening the editor.
trans-unit.target: Si voleu editar un codi anterior, seleccioneu-lo abans d'obrir l'editor.

trans-unit.resname: Open an existing mind map from your disk
trans-unit.source: Open an existing mind map from your disk
trans-unit.target: Obri un mapa mental existent del teu disc

trans-unit.resname: Open this map in a new window
trans-unit.source: Open this map in a new window
trans-unit.target: Obri aquest mapa en una nova finestra

trans-unit.resname: Save the mind map as a json file.
trans-unit.source: Save the mind map as a json file.
trans-unit.target: Guarda el mapa mental com a fitxer JSON.

trans-unit.resname: You can edit the mind map...
trans-unit.source: You can edit the mind map...

trans-unit.target: No s'han pogut guardar les propietats

trans-unit.resname: Please write the abbreviation and its meaning.
trans-unit.source: Please write the abbreviation and its meaning.
trans-unit.target: Escriviu l'abreviatura i el seu significat.

trans-unit.resname: The ACRONYM tag is not supported in HTML5.\n\nUse the ABBR tag instead?
trans-unit.source: The ACRONYM tag is not supported in HTML5.\n\nUse the ABBR tag instead?
trans-unit.target: L'etiqueta ACRONYM no és compatible amb HTML5.\n\nVoleu utilitzar en el seu lloc l'etiqueta ABBR?

trans-unit.resname: Link to the elp file (it will be exported)
trans-unit.source: Link to the elp file (it will be exported)

trans-unit.resname: Please enable JavaScript to play this game.
trans-unit.source: Please enable JavaScript to play this game.
trans-unit.target: Activeu JavaScript per a jugar a aquest joc.

trans-unit.resname: This is the message that the users with no JavaScript will see:
trans-unit.source: This is the message that the users with no JavaScript will see:
trans-unit.target: Aquest és el missatge que veuran els usuaris sense JavaScript:

trans-unit.resname: You can change it at any time.
trans-unit.source: You can change it at any time.

trans-unit.resname: Write the list of letters and/or numbers to choose from.
trans-unit.source: Write the list of letters and/or numbers to choose from.
trans-unit.target: Escriviu la llista de lletres i/o números per a triar.

trans-unit.resname: You may include capital letters or they can be automatically included.
trans-unit.source: You may include capital letters or they can be automatically included.
trans-unit.target: Podeu incloure majúscules o fer que s'incloguen automàticament.

trans-unit.resname: Choose if you want the game to be case sensitive.
trans-unit.source: Choose if you want the game to be case sensitive.
trans-unit.target: Trieu si voleu que el joc distingisca entre majúscules i minúscules.

trans-unit.resname: Add at least one word to guess (question or definition + word).
trans-unit.source: Add at least one word to guess (question or definition + word).
trans-unit.target: Afegiu almenys una paraula per a endevinar (pregunta o definició + paraula).

trans-unit.resname: You may delete the game from the editor itself.
trans-unit.source: You may delete the game from the editor itself.
trans-unit.target: Podeu suprimir el joc des del mateix editor.

trans-unit.resname: Don't forget to check the Accessibility tab.
trans-unit.source: Don't forget to check the Accessibility tab.
trans-unit.target: No oblideu comprovar la pestanya Accessibilitat.

trans-unit.resname: Provide a warning to users who have JavaScript disabled (Accessibility).
trans-unit.source: Provide a warning to users who have JavaScript disabled (Accessibility).
trans-unit.target: Proporcioneu un avís als usuaris que tinguen JavaScript desactivat (Accessibilitat).

trans-unit.resname: Please write the Alphabet to Select From
trans-unit.source: Please write the Alphabet to Select From

trans-unit.resname: A word to guess is missing
trans-unit.source: A word to guess is missing
trans-unit.target: Falta una paraula per a endevinar

trans-unit.resname: A hint or definition is missing
trans-unit.source: A hint or definition is missing

trans-unit.resname: Please add at least one word to guess
trans-unit.source: Please add at least one word to guess
trans-unit.target: Afegiu almenys una paraula per a endevinar
El títol de l'enllaç és obligatori

trans-unit.resname: Plain text. You can add a title.
trans-unit.source: Plain text. You can add a title.
trans-unit.target: Text pla. Podeu afegir un títol.

trans-unit.resname: Write the term and its definition. You may use HTML and edit it in the editor.
trans-unit.source: Write the term and its definition. You may use HTML and edit it in the editor.
trans-unit.target: Escriviu el terme i la seua definició. Podeu utilitzar HTML i editar-lo a l'editor.

trans-unit.resname: Show the content of the first Free Text iDevice in the specified page.
trans-unit.source: Show the content of the first Free Text iDevice in the specified page.
trans-unit.target: Mostra el contingut del primer iDevice de text lliure a la pàgina especificada.

trans-unit.resname: No selection and not in link
trans-unit.source: No selection and not in link
trans-unit.target: Sense selecció i no en un enllaç

trans-unit.resname: The tooltip data could not be retreived. Please create a new one choosing any of the available types.
trans-unit.source: The tooltip data could not be retreived. Please create a new one choosing any of the available types.
trans-unit.target: No s'han pogut recuperar les dades del missatge emergent. Creeu-ne un de nou triant qualsevol dels tipus disponibles.
Voleu crear una línia del temps?

trans-unit.resname: Change the text of the tabs adding a title to each Heading 2 with the "Insert/Edit Attributes" option:
trans-unit.source: Change the text of the tabs adding a title to each Heading 2 with the "Insert/Edit Attributes" option:
trans-unit.target: Canvieu el text de les pestanyes afegint un títol a cada Encapçalament 2 amb l'opció «Insereix/Edita atributs»:

trans-unit.resname: You just added that image. Save the iDevice or select the image again to update it.
trans-unit.source: You just added that image. Save the iDevice or select the image again to update it.
trans-unit.target: Acabeu d'afegir aquesta imatge. Guardeu l'iDevice o seleccioneu la imatge de nou per a actualitzar-la.

trans-unit.resname: $Save the current image$ before overwriting it.
trans-unit.source: $Save the current image$ before overwriting it.
trans-unit.target: $Guardeu la imatge actual$ abans de sobreescriure-la.

trans-unit.resname: You must review %s% of the contents of the activity before completing the questionnaire.
trans-unit.source: You must review %s% of the contents of the activity before completing the questionnaire.
trans-unit.target: Heu de revisar el %s% dels continguts de l'activitat abans de completar el qüestionari.

trans-unit.resname: An unexpected error occurred while processing the file.
trans-unit.source: An unexpected error occurred while processing the file.
trans-unit.target: S'ha produït un error inesperat processant el fitxer.

trans-unit.resname: Failed to load template. Please try again.
trans-unit.source: Failed to load template. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: No s'ha pogut carregar la plantilla. Torneu-ho a provar.

trans-unit.resname: This may take a few moments for large files...
trans-unit.source: This may take a few moments for large files...
trans-unit.target: Això pot tardar uns moments per a fitxers grans...

trans-unit.resname: Extracting ZIP file contents. This may take several minutes for large files.
trans-unit.source: Extracting ZIP file contents. This may take several minutes for large files.
trans-unit.target: Extraient el contingut del fitxer ZIP. Això pot tardar diversos minuts per a fitxers grans.

trans-unit.resname: Reading and validating file structure. Almost done!
trans-unit.source: Reading and validating file structure. Almost done!
trans-unit.target: Llegint i validant l'estructura del fitxer. Gairebé acabat!

trans-unit.resname: Another user is editing an iDevice on this block.
trans-unit.source: Another user is editing an iDevice on this block.
trans-unit.target: Un altre usuari està editant un iDevice en aquest bloc.
Falta el nom o el camí del fitxer
Dades de la sol·licitud no vàlides

trans-unit.resname: Highlight this page in the website navigation menu
trans-unit.source: Highlight this page in the website navigation menu
trans-unit.target: Resalta aquesta pàgina al menú de navegació del lloc web

trans-unit.resname: Adds additional information to the main title.
trans-unit.source: Adds additional information to the main title.
trans-unit.target: Afig informació addicional al títol principal.
